parameters.content:
## Whale Scanner

Runs every 5 minutes. Fetches the Polymarket leaderboard top 10, checks each wallet's recent trades, and alerts on any trade above $10K.

**Required env vars:**
- WEBHOOK_URL: The bot's webhook base URL (e.g. https://capitolbets-bot.onrender.com)

**Alert category:** whales
**Threshold:** $10,000 trade size, last 5 minutes
